Arc 1 > Arc 2
Hello, I remeber this server had a guide from someone who beat all chapters with SR only, does anyone have a link or name of the guy?
just what i have at the moment.
Ok better question I guess, what is the goal of this team? Poison? Status Affliction in general? Etc
Why are YOU making it
disregard
Frost and I are thinking similar things....you can go poison or flip to murphy/gmurphy team.

<@285755067213152257> thoughts on this and using gMurphy wheel in this team.

After Sorel burst turn, enemy gets 67k sacrifice. Don't know if Sorel really needs this.

Have you tried gMurphy wheel in other teams?
I have no reason to put it on other teams. Not because I think its unsuitable I think its insane as long as you're in blue but I frankly don't need it in Tawil nor play Corposant comp
At least not much
But before Fauxborn wheel came out I thought it had the strongest effect as long as you were in Aequor, and I've only been vindicated in that believe

Yeah I'm kinda thinking this is a tech move to give a team a "bleed" like effect when they need it for the wave. 

Mostly I'm thinking this may work nicer vs the shield + fortress enemies as a way to remove the sheild....

but then again with this comp, I'd just wait to burst and it would break the sheild anyway.....

So it works...but it is valuable and where..???
If Blue team = Fauxborn wheel
It's the Thais wheel of Aequor

well you split the gMurphy birth ritual.

with gMurphy = 25 stacks.

separate Team A with wheel = 10 Stacks Birth Ritual, Team B with GMurphy = 15 Stacks BR.....
It probably is just better to get more Birth Ritual on the gMurphy team in most cases.

I mean if you're borrowing I would say always grab the borrow with a hand size wheel at this point
But if you're doing double Fauxborn than yeah make sure both teams have it

Well I was looking for a way to make Jenkin Murphy work with no Corpo after I moved Corpo with Sorel.

And the Jenkin / Murphy / gMurphy team kinda fell into my lap. So I'm thinking I'll make it strong enough for A4 and use as Team 8 or 9.
Is there a recommended copy amount for corpo and gmurphy?

You can use both at E0 and both want E3 to get a better feel playing them. 

I used E0 Corpo for months.
I see so Kath is just the one I really need e3 for

I would never touch Corpo before e3 but my experience is vastly different form the average player
Corpo - e2 minimum tho
Okay thank you <a:AmiyaNoted:1411635989453213726>

Am I using a Blue Tawil correctly? Like this is the team I used to clear arc one, but now that there are raid bosses with fixed levels, I could try other lineups without investing into them and noticed that this one is kinda awful lol
the issue is that it takes too long to start doing damage lol
Tulu isn't good for this, he's mostly about scaling tentacle dmg which Bluewil doesn't really do much of
especially in arc2 when you have to pay for his rouse instead of getting it for free from a shop, he's best used in gMurphy teams or Corpo/Aurita stuff for further tent scaling

Also your covs are a bit weird.

Give Murphy the skey baby and Tulu the exalt one.
who to use instead of him? I have all blue except for Miriam. No arc 1 limited chaos supports like Hamelin or Ryker though sadly
you also want to max your exalt on Tawil since the cards you get from it are based on the rank of your exalt, and you want Dreams as covenant(although you might be too low for that yet)
you can just use chaos chars too
I kinda liked Ramona's wheel on her to dupe the rith generation or the 3 cost cards at random lol 😄
your cards are also low. I don't know when you can level them up, but that will help.
this team for comparison did a ton more damage way more consistently lol. Units are not built so did not have a chance to use them in story
Oh yea whats the best wheel for gramona and Ogier? There's really not much resources for this game so I have to resort to asking here ;;
well on boss everyone is autoleveled to max. So it is great to compare lineups to know what to work on
Yeah Pollux, gMurphy and Kathi excel at dealing damage.

depends on the arc and stuff, Ramona/gRamona have very high keyflare base stats though so they're good with any keyflare wheel+keyflare covenant, Ogier you can use his whatever he's just there for buffs so whatever is most helpful, if in arc1 he's a good candidate for rare wheels
well, what does Bluewil comp excels at lol? I thought all comps are supposed to do that to kill stuff
Okay thank you!
Stalling and killing over a longer period of time while you build up counter with Caecus.
Tawil helps to drop the strength of enemies. Works really well vs the tentacle based enemies.
can also do good dmg if you exalt lightning/waltz and prep a big turn with some 4wings for str into 0 cost lightning/waltz(E2) into more 6 wings spam with red tentacles on
but it's a long setup and arc2 kinda fucks over the long spam turns

wow,, really? I always thought she was supposed to get her some cards and do some burst turns on her own lol. No wonder this oes so badly, my Caecus+Wanda lineup for Dtide works way better at surviving and stacking counter
That's a big if, imagine getting a single good dmg card from the exalt...sounds like a sweet dream <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
This is why most endgame dtide players switch to monowil
Same units, different variations of wheels.
2 units that I lack though... How much potetial will a Kath team have? I was saving resources to can build her to e3 next month lol
Very high. That is a meta A5 dtide team.
how hard is arc 2 story (chapter 4 for 50 cores lol) compared to alert 5?
Also are there good chaos/ultra units to swap Ogier? This is my d-tide team and took his cause of easy vulrerability debuff

Certain boses are hardest content in game, but you can use gnosis in story. 

Tinct as an example is really good in chapter 4 Arc 2 right now as a tech piece.

That dtide team will work. Ogier is a great floater unit. So you can build him and swap out later if you want.
thanks, we'll see how it goes I guess lol. Wanted to test this Kath vs boss too but I heard that without e3 she is way worse

hiiii! i just started the game this morning and i was wondering what team i should focus on with these characters!!
Im starting to have to use gnosis on regular stages in ch7, what team should i build so i can save them up for the inevitable mass use in arc 2?
kath has been strong and reliable for me so far
leveling soulforge is really important for arc 2 so try to get that on your team
just 1 level will unlock the talent but every extra level just gives you a little bit more breathing room and comfort
every soulforge level is like an extra 2 levels on your character
Both Murphys, Castor, and Corpo
i suggest just going with ramona ogier lotan and whoever your favorite character is
Murphy fauxborn is very powerful but you don't really have the right team for her
the rest are niche
and fall off at endgame
just do story for a bit, get your new player pulls, and then try to get more characters
find a meta character you like and pull for them and build a team around them
Or pull for support characters for your gmurphy

What is sigil yield and realm mastery?<:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
for the free selector, i think hamlen is pretty op as a support, he can lower the damage of the ennemy, boost your own damage and draw insight cards
and if you want more chance to draw cards of your deck, the wolf guy is good too
but that's my own opinion since i've started to play the game like what, august or september
sigil yield is how many black sigils you get after fights
and if you're looking for a dps, i don't really know what to recommand you apart from pollux, he's quite op
realm mastery is how many units in a team are of that realm
the more units of the same realm the better the buffs
no that is wrong <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
how so?
the stat, realm mastery, comes from wheels, covenants, etc. it has different effects depending on the realm of the team
like for aequor it buffs all tentacle numbers
but generally speaking useless stat so you dont really have to worry about it <:cute1:1356053053568192717>

This is only true for Chaos units when mixed with other realms. The full description is in the wall of text in the chaos realm tooltip

Other realms provide no benefit for having more of that realm. They only give nerfs if they are paired with any realm other than chaos
I see, I have castor already so pollux might be a good choice
Welp, glad i somehow helped you in your choice
